message: No unit test failures found on main. Inspected 8 pages of check runs on HEAD commit e46873bc. All (Build UnitTest ...) jobs pass. Only failing CI sub-jobs are: (Integration PublishDocsToNightlyBranch) across many packages (PowerShell publish-to-nightly-branch infra failure) and (Build Build) for js-openai and js-resources-mgmt ("Path does not exist: /mnt/vss/_work/_temp/packages-dev-publish" — packaging infra issue). No test file annotations, no test case failures. Per workflow rules, no GitHub issue is created when there are no test failures.
